info.title: ICC_Kubera API
info.description: This API handles sales login, reporting, and other ICC operations. Developed by Channa.

get.description: This end-point controll for get alert from database to alert in telegrame.

post.description: This end-point controll for set alert from database to alert in telegrame.

get.description: Authenticate user and return JWT access + refresh token.
This endpoint is used to get warehouse and price.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: 'Bearer {token}'
